articles.title: OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
articles.summary: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.

articles.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
articles.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

articles.title: An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
articles.summary: Learn how Symphony, an open-source spec for Codex orchestration, turns issue trackers into always-on agent systems—boosting engineering output and reducing context switching.

articles.title: Choco automates food distribution with AI agents
articles.summary: How Choco used OpenAI APIs to streamline food distribution, boost productivity, and unlock growth—an in-depth customer story on real-world AI impact.

articles.title: Our principles
articles.summary: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.
